title: Bridge Essay: EEG Microstates in Altered States of Consciousness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** EEG microstates as neural signatures of altered states of consciousness — linking momentary brain states to phenomenological shifts

**EEG Microstates in Altered States of Consciousness.**. Frontiers in psychology. (2022). PMID: 35572333. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2022.856697. Conscious experiences unify distinct phenomenological experiences that seem to be continuously evolving. Yet, empirical evidence shows that conscious mental activity is discontinuous and can be parsed into aseries of states of thoughts that manifest as discrete spatiotemporal patterns of global neuronal activity lasting for fractions of seconds.
